steps.title: Define moderation
steps.content: The original effect was that products spaced far apart seemed more valuable than products spaced close together. To show moderation by an inexpensive store, that effect should remain but be weaker there.

steps.title: Compare effect sizes
steps.content: Choice B reverses the original effect. Choices C and D compare stores within one spacing condition rather than comparing far-apart and close-together displays within each store. The remaining finding shows a substantial spacing effect at Tiffany but only a slight one at Forever 21. The answer is A.
